_comment: Bioinformatics tools used by the cftk cfDNA methylation pipeline. Edit versions/citations as needed. This file is loaded by report_generator._sec_software().

tools.name: FastQC
tools.purpose: Per-base sequence quality, GC content, adapter, and duplication QC of raw and trimmed reads.

tools.name: Trim Galore
tools.purpose: Adapter and quality trimming of paired-end reads (wraps Cutadapt + FastQC).

tools.name: Cutadapt
tools.purpose: Adapter sequence removal (invoked by Trim Galore).

tools.name: MultiQC
tools.purpose: Aggregates FastQC, Trim Galore, and samtools metrics into per-step QC reports.

tools.name: bwa-meth
tools.purpose: Bisulfite-aware read alignment to the reference genome.

tools.name: BWA
tools.purpose: Core Burrows-Wheeler alignment engine used by bwa-meth.

tools.name: SAMtools
tools.purpose: BAM sorting, indexing, flagstat, and stats (mapping rate, insert size, error rate).

tools.name: Sambamba
tools.purpose: Duplicate marking and removal on aligned BAM files.

tools.name: MethylDackel
tools.purpose: Per-CpG methylation calling, CHH context extraction (bisulfite conversion QC), and M-bias estimation.

tools.name: BEDTools
tools.purpose: Fragment extraction (bamtobed), genomic interval operations, and dinucleotide nucleotide content (nuc).

tools.name: deepTools
tools.purpose: Fragment length distribution via bamPEFragmentSize.

tools.name: metilene
tools.purpose: De novo differentially methylated region (DMR) detection.

tools.name: annotatr
tools.purpose: Genomic annotation of DMRs (gene symbol, region type: promoter/intron/exon/CpG island).

tools.name: R
tools.purpose: Statistical environment for DMR annotation and downstream analysis.

tools.name: scikit-learn
tools.purpose: PCA, classifiers (RandomForest, LogisticRegression, SVC), and LOOCV for MESA multimodal modeling.

tools.name: NumPy
tools.purpose: Numerical computation across all analysis steps.

tools.name: pandas
tools.purpose: Tabular data handling and matrix operations.

tools.name: SciPy
tools.purpose: Statistical tests, KDE density estimation, and Spearman correlation.

tools.name: Matplotlib
tools.purpose: Static figure generation (methylation distribution, violin, heatmap, ROC, etc.).

tools.name: Plotly.js
tools.purpose: Interactive charts embedded in this HTML report.
